title: Comet in Moominland
original_title: 楽しいムーミン一家 ムーミン谷の彗星
overview: Moomintroll, Sniff and Little My set out to stop a comet approaching the Moominvalley. Along the way they meet Snufkin, the beautiful Snorkmaiden, Snork and Hemulen, who join them in their quest.
